import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import Sidebar from "./Sidebar"; export default function PaymentSystem() { const [payments, setPayments] = useState([]); const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false); const [file, setFile] = useState(null); const [form, setForm] = useState({ title: "", clientName: "", projectName: "", transactionFlow: "INCOMING", paymentType: "MILESTONE", milestoneName: "", milestonePercent: "", totalAmount: "", paidAmount: "", gstPercent: 18, tdsPercent: 2, paymentDate: "", dueDate: "", paymentMethod: "UPI", transactionId: "", createdByRole: "ADMIN", supplierName: "", workerName: "", notes: "" }); useEffect(() => { fetch("http://localhost:5000/payments") .then(r => r.json()) .then(setPayments); }, []); const handleChange = (e) => { setForm({ ...form, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; // ================= SAVE const savePayment = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const fd = new FormData(); Object.keys(form).forEach(key => { fd.append(key, form[key]); }); if (file) fd.append("invoice", file); const res = await fetch("http://localhost:5000/payments", { method: "POST", body: fd }); const data = await res.json(); setPayments([...payments, { ...form, id: data.id, status: data.status }]); setShowForm(false); }; return (
{/* HEADER */}
